title: Duplicating widgets to another dashboard
excerpt: Hi id like to copy widgets from other dashboards to create a business overview dashboard, there doesnt seem to be an obvious way to do this?  I can see each widget has an id number eg “ID 166780189” is there way to copy …

posts.author: Paul_Adams (Paul Adams)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi id like to copy widgets from other dashboards to create a business overview dashboard, there doesnt seem to be an obvious way to do this? I can see each widget has an id number eg “ID 166780189” is there way to copy that ID number then enter that into a destination dashboard to duplicate that widget and its settings?
thanks

posts.author: amber-upstream (Amber Heaford)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @Paul_Adams

Thanks for your query. As monday.com Preferred Platinum Partners at upstream, we have the expertise to craft a solution for your widget ID-based dashboard needs.

If you’re interested, we offer a paid service to scope out your project in detail. Keen on discussing further? Reach out directly:

+61 3 9067 5611 amber@upstreamtech.io

Best,
Amber
